description: Root template for cinematic non-fiction content. Defines the full baseline documentary production language. All documentary-derived genre templates inherit from this.

hook.goal: establish the central question and give the viewer a clear reason to continue

act_I.goal: provide essential context, establish credibility, introduce the subject

act_II.goal: build the case with verified facts, sources, and structured argument

act_III.goal: draw together the evidence toward a conclusion or clear observation

outro.goal: leave the viewer with a clear takeaway and a forward-looking thought

pacing.guiding_principle: Every moment earns its place. Never rush a fact. Never pad a transition.

camera_language.perspective_rule: Always establish location with a wide or aerial shot before moving to close-up detail.

text_on_screen.style: clean, minimal — text anchors facts, never decorates

intensity_arc.act_II: moderate — rises with the weight of evidence
intensity_arc.act_III: measured — builds toward resolution without manipulation

music_language.tempo_guidance: slow to moderate tempo, no driving percussion beats

required_beats.description: Opening that establishes the central question, mystery, or claim of the video and gives the viewer a compelling reason to continue.
Background information establishing why this story matters, the historical or geographic setting, and what the viewer needs to know to follow the evidence.
Presentation of verified facts and sources supporting the central argument or narrative, building methodically.
Drawing together the evidence into a coherent conclusion, observation, or honest assessment of what remains unknown.
Clear ending statement that gives the viewer something meaningful to carry with them after the video ends.

thumbnail_strategy.composition_rule: strong focal image with clear subject — readable at thumbnail size

tonal_modes.major_finding: measured emphasis — significant but never sensational

narrator_guidance.pacing_notes: Read at a pace that allows each sentence to land before the next begins. Pause after key facts. Do not rush evidence to fill time.

forbidden_elements.reason: Documentary credibility is built on verifiable truth. Fabrication destroys the trust that defines the genre.
Misrepresentation of real individuals is both ethically wrong and legally risky.
Undermines viewer trust and violates creator quality standards.
Disrespectful to subjects and families. Violates creator absolute safety rules.
